# Treosulfan 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Treosulfan 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Treosulfan</strong> 目前有 <strong>12 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Treosulfan 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treosulfan in combination with fludarabine is indicated as part of conditioning treatment prior to allogeneic haematopoietic stem cell transplantation (alloHSCT) in adult patients&nbsp;and in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（98.9%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（98.9%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（98.9%）</li>
<li>odontogenic cyst（96.6%）</li>
<li>bronchial adenomas/carcinoids childhood（96.6%）</li>
<li>chondroid hamartoma（96.6%）</li>
<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（96.6%）</li>
<li>non-seminomatous lesion（96.6%）</li>
<li>pre-malignant neoplasm（96.6%）</li>
<li>tumor of testis and paratestis（96.6%）</li>
<li>thyroglossal duct cyst（96.5%）</li>
<li>nasopharyngeal teratoma（96.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/treosulfan/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
